opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My feet are burning and itching so badly I can't even put socks on, and the skin between my toes is raw and leaking.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Intensely itchy, raw, weeping skin between my toes has flared and I can't wear shoes.

symptom_narrative.character: itching/burning, scaling and soggy white maceration between the toes with painful fissures
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't put socks on, raw and leaking
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: between my toes and the soles
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: foot odour, thickened skin on the soles; uses communal gym showers; NO fever, no spreading hot redness up the foot, no red streaks; not diabetic

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; communal gym showers; sweaty sneakers

objective_data_offered.value: scaling/soggy white maceration and painful fissures between the toes, thickened soles, visible on video
no fever, no spreading hot redness/red streaks up the foot
